sapphicpisceslover:

I love the thought of corrupting a sweet girl so so much, to have her on my lap and slip my hand between her legs causing her to spread them wider while her face turns red. “It feels good, doesn’t it darling?” I’d ask her, rubbing her clit over her underwear, damp spot growing as she tries not to grind against my hand before I push her underwear to the side, feeling how truly fucking soaked she is as she looks away, hand on her mouth, too ashamed of the sounds coming out of it. “Don’t hold back from me, princess, let me hear how pretty you sound. I know you like it, you’re so wet for me. So ready for me to ruin you.”

This is about lesbian sex, men and minors DNI
